channel.title: Sonika Janagill - Google Developer Expert
channel.description: Google Developer Expert in Cloud AI & Google Cloud sharing insights on AI, MLOps, Cloud Architecture, and Enterprise Transformation

item.title: Instructions. Skills. Tools. How Google Embedded Skills Into Every Layer of Its Agent Stack
item.description: Prompt Bloat has a name and a fix. Skills are now load-bearing across Google's agent stack: from on-device Gemma 4 to enterprise Gemini, from coding assistants to the official Cloud repository.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: Google Cloud's Agent Ops Stack: Why Deployment Is No Longer the Hard Part
item.description: The Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform shifts the conversation from deployment to governance. We are leaving the era of the Request/Response cycle and entering the era of the Long-Lived Agentic Session.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: Gemma 4 and the Rise of Agentic Commerce: A Hands-On Enterprise Perspective
item.description: Gemma 4 brings native function-calling, multimodal vision, and Apache 2.0 to open models. Here's what it means for enterprise agentic commerce systems.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: The Skills Explosion Is Here. Enterprise Governance Isn't.
item.description: Anthropic's creators say stop building agents, start building skills. They're right. But 170 skills in production taught us something they didn't cover: the hard part isn't building them. It's governing them.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: AdkBot: Building a Personal AI Agent with Google ADK on Cloud Run
item.description: Build a secure personal AI agent with Google ADK 1.0 on Cloud Run. 6-layer GCP security, human-in-the-loop approvals, Cloud DLP, and Workload Identity Federation.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: Cost-Optimised MLOps: Reducing Infrastructure Spend by 80%
item.description: Learn 5 architectural patterns that reduced MLOps costs from $6,600/month to $1,200/month (82% reduction). Auto-shutdown, Spot VMs, zero-scaling inference, Feature Store caching, and multi-cloud WIF patterns.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: Internet of Agents: AGNTCY, Protocols, and Mach Alliance's Agent Ecosystem
item.description: How AGNTCY, open protocols, and MACH Alliance are building interoperable AI agent systems—and why enterprise architects must act now to avoid lock-in.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: Implementing Zero-Trust Multi-Cloud: A Complete WIF Setup Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to implement Workload Identity Federation for AWS→Vertex AI and Azure→Vertex AI. Production-ready code, real troubleshooting, enterprise patterns.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: Stop Storing Cloud Secrets: How Workload Identity Federation Eliminates Static Keys
item.description: Static credentials cost you money, time, and security. Learn how Workload Identity Federation eliminates secrets entirely through cryptographic trust and zero-trust architecture.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: The Hidden Cost of Data Chaos in ML Projects
item.description: Most ML projects fail not because of models, but because of data chaos. Understand the real costs, failure patterns, and how MLOps reduces failure and accelerates time to production.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: The Creator Divide: Why Fresh Voices Are Solving Problems Experts Miss
item.description: AI didn't just make learning easier — it changed who gets to innovate. Explore how democratised knowledge is creating a divide between optimisation and innovation, and why diverse voices are the key to solving tomorrow's problems.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: Architecture Decisions: Cloud Composer vs Vertex AI Pipelines
item.description: A practical decision framework for choosing between Cloud Composer and Vertex AI Pipelines. Learn when to use each tool, hybrid patterns, and real-world case studies for enterprise ML infrastructure.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)

item.title: Why Hackathons Are Your Fast-Track to AI Mastery
item.description: Explore how hackathons accelerate AI learning and skill development. Learn from my 2025 hackathon journey including AWS AI Hackathon win and insights on building real-world AI solutions.
item.author: sonika.janagill@gmail.com (Sonika Janagill)
